title: Iran suspends talks with US over Israeli attacks in Lebanon — Araghchi: 'ceasefire on all fronts, violation on one = violation on all'
snippet: Iran's negotiating team has halted 'talks and exchange of texts through mediators,' Tasnim reports. Foreign Minister Araghchi states: 'ceasefire on all fronts, including Lebanon. Violation on one front equals violation on all fronts.' Iran explicitly links Lebanese operations to broader US-Iran peace framework, conditioning continuation of talks on Israeli de-escalation in Lebanon.
tag_reason: 신규 사건 — 이란이 미국과의 협상을 공식적으로 중단. 레바논 이스라엘 공격을 이유로 모든 중재자 통한 소통 중지. 5/31 협상 교착 상태에서 공식 중단으로 격상된 새로운 발전
